notes: Validity (def:valid-argument-form) of the dilemma is load-bearing and present. The edge to thm:disjunctive-syllogism is flagged: the standard proof is a direct case analysis on phi or psi (phi gives chi via phi->chi; psi gives theta via psi->theta; so chi or theta), which does not obviously invoke disjunctive syllogism. Reviewer to confirm the intended proof route; if it is pure case-analysis, this edge may be dropped.
